---
title: "Country Analysis: China"
---

## Introduction

This page explores changes in life expectancy, GDP per capita, and population in China over time.

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

df = pd.read_csv("gapminder.csv")
china = df[df["country"] == "China"]

plt.plot(china["year"], china["life_expectancy"], label="Life Expectancy")
plt.plot(china["year"], china["gdp_per_capita"], label="GDP per Capita")
plt.legend()
plt.xlabel("Year")
plt.title("China Over Time")
plt.show()
